function.name: reverse_geocode
function.description: Convert coordinates into a readable address.
function.long_description: Transforms geographic coordinates (latitude and longitude) into a human-readable address using an external reverse geocoding service.
example_user_queries: What location corresponds to latitude 40.7484 and longitude -73.9857?
Find the address for lat 51.5074 and lon -0.1278.
Look up the place for latitude 48.8584 and longitude 2.2945.
Find the place name for lat 19.0760 and lon 72.8777.
